name: Bubble and Squeak 1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Any green vegetable, such as cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mixture by smashing together leftover mashed potatoes and chopped green vegetables (e.g., cabbage) in a bowl until well combined.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
3. Season with your preferred spices or herbs.
4. Form the mixture into patties of desired serving size.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Once hot, add a small amount of oil if needed.
6. Cook the patties for about 10-15 minutes on each side until they are golden brown and crispy.
7. Serve the bubble and squeak as a carbohydrate component to your meal.
